command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute 
SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS 
WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'projects' AND DATA_TYPE IN ('text', 'mediumtext', 'longtext', 'varchar')
ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	DATA_TYPE
projectKey	varchar
name	varchar
location	varchar
value	varchar
owner	varchar
stage	varchar
overview	text
opportunityNote	text
timeline	varchar
completion	varchar
staleReason	varchar
duplicateClusterId	varchar
suppressionReason	varchar
tenderNumber	varchar
projectCountry	varchar
projectState	varchar
